query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Arcing bands of white and pale pink light cross a warm yellow-orange background, converging near a large bright circular area in the upper left, with softer brown curved forms visible along the right edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph employing intentional motion blur shows arcing bands of white and pale pink light streaking across a warm yellow-orange background. Extreme overexposure blows out a large circular area in the upper left, while the image lacks recognizable subject matter and fine detail throughout, with smeared, mushy textures dissolving into pure color and gestural form.
